agent_examples.companyResearch.trigger.a: Research this company on the web
agent_examples.companyResearch.sheet.des: An AI agent searches the public web to qualify {company} as a sales prospect — size, revenue, funding, and deal fit. Every finding links to its source.
agent_examples.companyResearch.error.sel: Select a single organization before running company research.
agent_examples.companyResearch.error.for: You need agent-run and web-search permissions to research a company.
agent_examples.companyResearch.error.not: The company researcher agent is not available. Run "yarn generate" and restart OpenCode.
agent_examples.companyResearch.error.bus: The agent runner is busy. Try again shortly.
The agent runner is busy. Try again in {seconds}s.
agent_examples.companyResearch.error.fai: The research run could not complete — it may have timed out or been blocked.
agent_examples.companyResearch.error.une: The agent returned an unexpected result shape.
